title: .aieng claim map
description: Maps structured engineering claims to required and actual evidence IDs. Claims without evidence are marked 'unsupported', not false. .aieng records which claims are supported by evidence from external tools.

claim_map_id.description: Stable identifier for this claim map.

source_task_id.description: Optional: task_id from task/task_spec.yaml if a task spec is present.

claim_type.description: Category of claim. Known values: task/task_defined, handoff/contract_defined, solver/result_available, mesh/evidence_available, geometry/modification_evidence_available.

required_evidence_ids.description: Evidence IDs from evidence_index.json required to support this claim.

actual_evidence_ids.description: Evidence IDs from evidence_index.json actually present in this package.

verification_status.description: Whether this claim is currently supported by evidence. 'unsupported' means no evidence exists yet - not that the claim is false.

decision_criteria.description: Per-claim thresholds declaring what constitutes sufficient evidence for pass/fail/needs_review. auto_advance must be false to preserve evidence-only policy.

claims.description: List of engineering claims and their evidence status.

external_tools_execute.description: Must be true. Solver execution, mesh generation, and CAD modification are performed by external tools only.

aieng_core_generates_solver_evidence.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not run solvers or generate solver evidence.

aieng_core_generates_mesh_evidence.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not generate meshes or mesh evidence.

aieng_core_modifies_cad_geometry.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not directly modify CAD geometry.

claim_policy.description: Claim policy constraints for the claim map. All flags enforce the execution boundary.

$comment: Phase 14C: claim-evidence map. 'unsupported' means no evidence has been attached yet - not that the claim is false or violated. claim_policy const guards enforce .aieng execution boundary.
